'''Ferra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomiri Witch]] of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]]. During the [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of Dathomir]], she was killed when her neck was broken by a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] causing [[Teneniel Djo]] to lash out in anger and use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to kill the Nightsisters.<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />
